title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 237.040 - License issued, when
text:
237.040.  License issued, when. — Upon the production of the receipt of the collector of the county for the tax to such clerk, he shall issue a license to keep a ferry, at the place therein mentioned, for any term not exceeding five years, the said term to be fixed by the county commission in its discretion; provided, that no license shall be issued for a longer term than five years.
(RSMo 1939 § 15289) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14201; 1919 § 5535; 1909 § 6478
